bird.name: 小鸥
bird.summary: The little gull (Hydrocoloeus minutus) is a species of gull belonging to the family Laridae which is mainly found in the Palearctic with so…

relations.subject: 小鸥
relations.evidence: The little gull nests in areas of dense vegetation where there are emergent or plants with floating leaves in shallow freshwater bodies, slow-moving rivers, marshes and bogs, occasionally using costal lagoons or other brackish water habitats
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
